1/*===-- llvm-c/Linker.h - Module Linker C Interface -------------*- C++ -*-===*\
2|* *|
3|* The LLVM Compiler Infrastructure *|

6|* License. See LICENSE.TXT for details. *|
7|* *|
8|*===----------------------------------------------------------------------===*|
9|* *|
10|* This file defines the C interface to the module/file/archive linker. *|
11|* *|
12\*===----------------------------------------------------------------------===*/
13
14#ifndef LLVM_C_LINKER_H
15#define LLVM_C_LINKER_H
16
17#include "llvm-c/Core.h"
18
19#ifdef __cplusplus
20extern "C" {
21#endif
22
23
24/* Note: LLVMLinkerPreserveSource has no effect. */
25typedef enum {
26 LLVMLinkerDestroySource = 0, /* Allow source module to be destroyed. */
27 LLVMLinkerPreserveSource = 1 /* Preserve the source module. */
28} LLVMLinkerMode;
29
30
31/* Links the source module into the destination module, taking ownership
32 * of the source module away from the caller. Optionally returns a
33 * human-readable description of any errors that occurred in linking.
34 * OutMessage must be disposed with LLVMDisposeMessage. The return value
35 * is true if an error occurred, false otherwise. */
36LLVMBool LLVMLinkModules(LLVMModuleRef Dest, LLVMModuleRef Src,
37 LLVMLinkerMode Mode, char **OutMessage);
38
39#ifdef __cplusplus
40}
41#endif
42
43#endif
